title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 36.5%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This is the wages of Starmer Labour's utter cynicism about the public IMO. 

There are so many instances (tax, the EU, etc) where they'd be way more popular if they just gave it to people straight, but they remain com...
